since_last: 70% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +2.75%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.30% · BTC +2.48% · Gold +2.38% · Nasdaq100 +1.00%. 70% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +2.75%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +2.75%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.19%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -23.98%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +7.10%, OKTA +6.54%, DELL +5.57%, LEU +5.44%, LRCX +5.27%. Laggards: IBM -23.98%, SKHY -8.63%, WDAY -6.52%, NOW -5.51%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.70% at $141.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.70% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
